free assistance to researchers using Medicare data for research. The ResDAC website provides links to descriptions of 
the CMS data available, request procedures, supporting documentation, such as record layouts and SAS input 
statements, workshops on how to use Medicare data, and other helpful resources. 

If a ResDAC technical advisor is not able to answer researchers’ questions, the technical advisor directs the researcher
